title: Supply Ledger Authorization Signatures
description: Eleven entries in the bridge camp's waterproof supply ledger notebook, each signed with the same authorization code in Father Clement Tureaud's block handwriting. Cross-referencing the code against the diocesan emergency relief fund number printed on a pamphlet in the camp's first-aid kit reveals a four-digit discrepancy — the code Father Clement has been using does not match the official fund number. He has been signing receipts with a self-generated authorization that carries no institutional backing.
